entries.source: What achievement system should we design?
entries.value: Ni mfumo gani wa mafanikio tunapaswa kuusanifu?

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Tengeneza beji kwa ajili ya uthabiti, umahiri, ujasiri, marekebisho, ushirikiano, na kazi zilizokamilika.
